hero.title: The Essence of {Purity}
hero.subtitle: Leading the way in premium Essential Oil exports from the heart of the hills, beginning with our flagship high-purity Lemongrass Oil.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChooseUs.description: Kodai Global Exports follows a {structured and quality-focused approach} in the production and export of premium Essential Oils and Natural Extracts. We give high importance on consistency and purity in every batch, while strictly following international quality standards throughout our operations.
whyChooseUs.subDescription: Our current specialty, Lemongrass Oil, is produced from carefully selected raw materials and processed under controlled conditions to maintain high quality. Before shipment, every batch is tested and verified to ensure it meets global standards and buyer requirements.
whyChooseUs.quote: Rather than making big claims, we focus on honest communication, transparency, and proper documentation. Our structured processes help us maintain reliability in international markets.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to produce and supply high-quality, pure Essential Oils and Natural Extracts that meet international standards and buyer requirements. We are fully committed to maintaining consistent quality and ensuring on-time delivery through responsible operations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our vision is to become a globally trusted producer of premium Essential Oils, recognized for quality excellence, sustainability, and responsible business practices.

items.title: Quality
items.description: We follow strict quality control and testing procedures in line with international standards to produce premium Essential Oils.
items.details: Each batch is carefully inspected and verified before dispatch to ensure consistent quality and purity.

items.title: Commitment
items.description: Customer satisfaction is our top priority. We focus on building long-term professional relationships.
items.details: Delivering consistent quality and reliable service every time is our core promise.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: We maintain complete transparency in our production process, quality testing, and export documentation.
items.details: Integrity and ethical business practices are the foundation of everything we do.

items.title: Responsibility
items.description: We strictly follow all regulatory, safety, and export compliance standards professionally.
items.details: Ensuring every shipment is delivered safely, reliably, and professionally to international markets.

mdMessage.title: {Managing Director’s} Message
paragraphs: Kodai Global Exports was established with a clear vision to reliably supply high-quality agricultural and essential oil products from India to global markets.
Guided by our core values of quality, transparency, and regulatory compliance, we are committed to building long-term, trusted relationships with our customers, farmers, and business partners.
We are dedicated to delivering premium Lemongrass Oil and agricultural products that meet international buyer expectations in terms of quality, sustainability, and on-time delivery.
Through a dependable supply chain and strong partnerships, we continuously strive to create lasting value across global markets.

cta.title: Ready to experience the pure essence?
